int.name: Auto-claim DCC Addresses
int.description: When enabled, automatically creates a traction node for any requested DCC address.

int.name: RailCom Cutout
int.description: Enable the RailCom cutout at the end of each DCC packet.

int.name: Main Track Limit (mA)
int.description: Maximum current allowed on the Main track before tripping a fault.

int.name: Programming Track Limit (mA)
int.description: Maximum current allowed on the Programming track before tripping a fault.

int.name: Signal Pin
int.description: GPIO pin driving the DCC signal (drives pin and pin+1).

int.name: Power Enable Pin
int.description: GPIO pin to enable/disable power to the track.

int.name: Brake Pin
int.description: GPIO pin used for RailCom cutout brake signaling.

int.name: Fault Pin
int.description: GPIO pin used for fault reporting from the motor shield.

int.name: ADC Channel
int.description: ADC channel used for current sensing.

int.name: Signal Pin
int.description: GPIO pin driving the DCC signal.

int.name: Power Enable Pin
int.description: GPIO pin to enable/disable power to the track.

int.name: Fault Pin
int.description: GPIO pin used for fault reporting.

int.name: ADC Channel
int.description: ADC channel used for current sensing.
